title: Climbable Chains
description: Lets you climb chain blocks across multiple versions!
body:
This datapack allows chain blocks to be climbed, perfect for adventure maps and builders who want to implement functional chains!

Created for the UT Austin Minecraft server, derex smp.





## Modpack Usage
Just credit me and i'm chill with having this used in any modpacks



## Join our modding discord!  
(dm me about the SMP if interested)
![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/u3V5mdF.png)
